description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a sleek, modern design and a predominantly black exterior accented by blue highlights. The aircraft features a high-wing configuration, providing stability and good visibility for the cockpit, which is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with clear windows. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a nose wheel, all fixed and visible beneath the fuselage. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The wings are straight and lack winglets, with blue striping along their length. The overall appearance suggests a light utility or general aviation aircraft suitable for short-range flights.
description: A sleek, black and blue high-wing single-engine airplane with a forward cockpit, fixed tricycle landing gear, and a conventional tail. The propeller is nose-mounted, and the aircraft has a modern, streamlined appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose-mounted propeller, forward cockpit windows, and the high-wing configuration with fixed landing gear visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight high-mounted wing, streamlined fuselage, and the fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the propeller, cockpit placement, and the blue accent lines along the fuselage and wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with straight wings, no winglets, and minimal dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
